MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Roman Shkodnik, Esq. (818.230.8380; roman@yeremianlaw.com) of David Yeremian & Associates, Inc. for Plaintiff.
Brian Newman, Esq. (213.457.1731; BNewman@dykema.com) of Dykema for Defendant, Candid Care.

Not argued. Discussion held re: settlement payments to be distributed by the settlment administrator. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KALIVA MORGAN'S MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT, ATTORNEYS' FEES AND EXPENSES, AND INCENTIVE AWARD.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for final approval of the class action settlement, attorneys' fees and expenses, and incentive award" is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KALIVA MORGAN'S Motion For An Order Preliminarily Approving The Class Action Settlment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for an order (1) preliminarily approving the class action settlement; and (2) approving notice of class action settlement" is granted. Final approving date set for October 19, 2022 @ 9:30am in Dept. 302.

Order signed.
